Reward and 1 winner Combinedly from “B” and “A” Category Distributor from each Cluster.
National toppers among category “A” distributors will receive Super Mega rewards “Royal
Enfield Bike”

Itop-up numbers will be considered for Deno wise incentive payout

There is no threshold to be eligible for the campaign, that means any hit from the selected
Itop-up numbers will be considered for Deno wise incentive payout
Distributor will be given incentives as per following table (Distributor wise HIT Target will be
share by B2C).
If achieved more than 200% than incentives will be calculated based on higher deno to
lower den HIT count (Distributor wise selected retailers Itop number will be share by B2C)
Performance will be measured from selected itop numbers.

Incentive is capped at 200% of the target

Example for Clarity

Scenario:

Region-A is given a target of 10,000 hits on selected Denos during the campaign period.

Outcome:

Region A achieves 10,500 hits (105%).

Incentive Calculation:

Since the region crossed 100% achievement, all DDs under Region A are eligible for BDT 20 per hit.
If a DD under Region A contributed 1,200 hits:
Their incentive = 1,200 × 20 = BDT 24,000

Deno HIT
Distributor will be given Deno HIT target. (Target will be provided by B2C)

419, 559 & 569 (North East Cluster, Central Cluster, East Cluster, North Cluster)

incentives per HIT for Deno 419, 559 & 569 (Distributor wise HIT Target will be share by B2C).
Upon achieving 90% to 99% Deno HIT target (Cumulative of DENO), Distributor will be given BDT 20
incentives per HIT for Deno 419, 559 & 569 (Distributor wise HIT Target will be share by B2C).
For West Cluster :
Upon achieving Deno HIT target (Cumulative of DENO), Distributor will be given BDT 40
incentives per HIT for Deno 419, 429, 459, 559 & 569 (Distributor wise HIT Target will be share
by B2C).
Upon achieving 90% to 99% Deno HIT target (Cumulative of DENO), Distributor will be given BDT 30
incentives per HIT for Deno 419, 429, 459, 559 & 569 (Distributor wise HIT Target will be share by B2C).
Incentive is capped at 200% of the target for all cluster
Agent list of 14th Oct’25 will be considered.

will be rounded up is applicable for achievement calculation.

Deno Participation
There will be no Target for RSO’s (RSO list will share by B2C)
Deno: 639, 698, 699, 798, 819, 998, 999
Upon Deno participation (Cumulative of DENO), RSO will be given incentives as per
following Slab

Retail Participation Means: at least one HIT from any selected DENO from a retail, count as Retail
participation during the campaign period.
“Any cross cluster hit from retail will be discarded from retail participation achievements
and RSO payouts.”Note: “If Region-A within a cluster is adjacent to the closest Region-B &
Regions-C of another cluster, then any cross-cluster interactions between Region-A,
Region-B & Region-C will be excluded from cross-cluster conditions.”(Cross Cluster HIT will
share by B2C)
Any Transaction made on Postpaid numbers will not be considered in achievement (SERVICE_CLASS_ID
equal and above 1000 will not be consider).
Any recharge of campaign deno at BL employee pool phone number will not be considered for DH &
Retail achievement. Employee mapping 31st Dec’25 will be consider.


Ryze Recharge (Service Class 141) will not be considered for performance calculation.
Agent list of 17th Jan’26 will be considered.
General mathematical rounding, i.e. below 0.5 will be rounded down and greater than or equal to 0.5
will be rounded up is applicable for achievement calculation.

Deno Participation
RSO will be given Deno Participation Target (RSO wise target will share by B2C)
Deno: 319_357 (16th to 22nd Feb’26)
Deno: 227 (18th to 22nd Feb’26)
Upon Deno participation (Cumulative of DENO), RSO will be given incentives BDT 100 to
BDT 200 (RSO wise target and Incentive amount will share by B2C)
Additional Incentives: BDT 8 will be given per incremental POS participation above target.

participation during the campaign period.

equal and above 1000 will not be consider).
